subcodes.first_line: O ye who are related to the illustrious Visitor! Though heart and soul yearn that a letter might be penned to each one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبین جناب زائر هر چند دل و جانرا آرزو چنان که بهر یک نامه ای مرقوم گردد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @Shrines and Holy places, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
